data.body:
## Gap Analysis Amendment (critical)
The roadmap integration must define how the scorer's P0-P4 output interacts with the existing quadrant system:
(a) The scorer REPLACES the Phase 3 inline 1-10 scoring — the 1-5 scale IS the scorer
(b) Quadrant placement maps to priority: Quick Wins → P0-P1, Strategic Bets → P1-P2, Fill-ins → P3, Avoid/Later → P4
(c) Enabler logic OVERRIDES scorer recommendation — enablers inherit the priority of the epic they unblock
(d) Phase 5 ticket create uses the scorer-determined priority (or enabler override) via -p flag
